name: Miles and More Axis Bank Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Miles and More Axis Bank Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 3,000 award miles annual renewal bonus for Miles and More Axis Bank World Credit Card
World Select variant offers 4,000 award miles annual renewal bonus
additionalBenefits: 5,000 welcome award miles on first transaction for Miles and More Axis Bank World Credit Card
World Select variant offers 15,000 welcome award miles
4 award miles per Rs 200 of eligible spends on World Credit Card
World Select variant earns 6 award miles per Rs 200 of eligible spends
Award miles do not expire while card terms for activity are met
2 complimentary Priority Pass lounge visits per card membership year on World Credit Card
World Select variant offers 4 complimentary Priority Pass lounge visits per card membership year
4 complimentary domestic Mastercard lounge visits per quarter on World Credit Card, subject to spends criteria
World Select variant offers 8 complimentary domestic Mastercard lounge visits per quarter, subject to spends criteria
Dining Delights offers may apply; Axis page lists enhanced dining offers for World Select

salaried: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
selfEmployed: Primary cardholder should be 18 to 70 years of age and resident of India or NRI
